embeds.Title: Silver Thorn Nectar
embeds.description:
*Complimentary to Silver Thorn patrons*
[`+buy nectar` / `+use nectar`]
A sweet beverage with a honeyed flavor and a subtle kick of cinnamon, served chilled.
The nectar's mild aphrodisiac effect lowers the inhibitions of those who partake of it.
